_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the broken-named-range branch of the excel-activities/read-range-null-reference playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (bare NRE) → jobs logs (Get Workbook Sheets succeeded; Read Range Trace shows 'resolving named range MyDataRange (RefersTo: #REF!)') → workflow source. The combination of (named-range Range in source) + (RefersTo: #REF! in logs) is decisive for branch 3.
